title: harden release freeze finalizer to regenerate complete candidate evidence
rawUserRequest: 最后一个 archive-boundary 工单合并并 ai-close-work-item 后，release preflight 发现 baseCommit、sourceTree、archiveSha256 与 release.json 仍是旧候选值。发布必须保持冻结，先在 protected main 上通过完整 Contract/Preflight/PR/合并/ai-close-work-item 流程重新生成并提交 release metadata。

declaredIntent.summary: 在所有前置纠正工单关闭且默认分支同步后，重新生成 source-bound release freeze/digests/release.json，使候选发布身份与当前默认分支一致。

outOfScope: Publishing a provider release or creating a tag
Starting or reordering planned Work Items

sources.reason: Observed post-close identity mismatch and final verification gate.

riskAssessment.reason: Generated release identity must remain candidate-only and source-bound; publication is explicitly out of scope.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized completion of the post-close protected-main metadata lifecycle before release publication.

preReviewWarnings: Review candidate/historical/published state separation and exact source-bound identity.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: make finalize-release-freeze regenerates the complete candidate release projection, including release-digests.json, after lifecycle closure and synchronized-base checks.
The finalizer updates release-digests.json release.json identity after writing release.json, preventing a stale digest projection.
The protected-main PR carries exactly one Work Item and the full lifecycle closes after merge.
Formatter, governance budget, and release evidence checks pass.
guidelines: Release metadata is candidate evidence, not published evidence.
Run finalization only after merge, ai-close-work-item, and default-base synchronization.
Template repository only; do not transplant release identity into adopters.

intent.problem: The last archive closure changed the canonical source identity, but the protected-main release projections still attest the earlier candidate. Direct editing or publication would create an unverifiable release identity.
constraints: Keep release publication frozen and out of scope.
Use the repository finalizer and protected-main PR.
Do not start or reorder planned Work Items.
intent.rationale: Candidate metadata must be regenerated from the exact synchronized source tree after all lifecycle closures; a PR preserves review and protected-main provenance.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User authorized post-close release metadata correction through the protected-main PR lifecycle before publication.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.

evidence: make check-release-preflight observed stale candidate mismatch
Contract outOfScope excludes provider release/tag publication
